patterns.meta_field_pattern: All optional fields use #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]; snake_case in JSON; added to Default impl as None
patterns.card_view_enrichment: from_meta() builds CardView with defaults; caller enriches plan data afterward (phase_name, phase_frac currently None/0.0)
patterns.render_progress: CardRenderer::render_progress(pct, phase, phase_frac) — 16-cell bar with █░, optional phase + moon glyph
patterns.swift_codable: BopCardMeta uses CodingKeys enum for snake_case mapping; new fields are Optional with CodingKey entries
patterns.swift_tab_pattern: CardTab enum CaseIterable; selectedTab state; ForEach over allCases with onTapGesture; @ViewBuilder methods per tab
patterns.watch_pattern: list_cards_watch uses notify_debouncer_mini (100ms), tokio::select!, cursor-up ANSI for minimal redraw

existing_implementations.phase_name_phase_frac: CardView already has phase_name: Option<String> and phase_frac: f32 — used in full.rs render_progress and kanban.rs build_progress_line; currently always None/0.0 from from_meta()
existing_implementations.moon_glyph: Both full.rs and kanban.rs have moon_glyph(frac) → ◔◑◕● for 0-25/25-50/50-75/75-100 brackets
existing_implementations.subtasks_tab_swift: Quick Look already has subtasksTab with checkmark.circle.fill/circle SF Symbols, doneCount/totalCount, percentage
existing_implementations.dispatch_write_approval: dispatch.nu line 196: write_approval approves spec for AC runner; run_spec (line 236) calls write_approval then spawns pane

key_decisions.spec_half_circle_glyphs: Spec wants ○◔◑◕● at 0/1-33/34-66/67-99/100 thresholds — DIFFERENT from existing moon_glyph ◔◑◕● at 25/50/75 brackets. New function needed.
key_decisions.plan_data_source: implementation_plan.json is found via: git_root/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json using glob/prefix match
key_decisions.enrichment_location: Plan enrichment happens in collect_card_views() AFTER from_meta() — new acplan.rs module provides the parser and enrichment logic
key_decisions.card_view_extensions: Need ac_subtasks_done/ac_subtasks_total on CardView for N/T display; progress overridden from plan completion %
